title: Seeking Nominations for 2025 Patti Hyslop Leadership in Sobriety Award
summary: It is time once again to select the person/persons for the Patti L. Hyslop Award. title: SNC Spring Shareholder Records Drive
summary: Sitnasuak Native Corporation encourages our Shareholders to complete or update their ANCSA Stock Will to ensure that their shares are passed on to their named heirs. ANCSA Stock Will forms are available at both the Nome and Anchorage offices and can also be accessed on our website at: https://snc.or...

title: 2025 Elder of the Year Nomination
summary: Sitnasuak Native Corporation (SNC) is accepting nominations for the 2025 Elder of the Year.
